title: seseli montanum subsp. glaucum
intro: Seseli montanum subsp. glaucum, also known as mountain sesame or blue mountain fern, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its carminative and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve digestive issues and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Seseli montanum subsp. glaucum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and promote relaxation.
